subject: Scheduled maintenance window — Saturday
body:
Hello,

We will be performing scheduled exterior maintenance this Saturday from 9 AM to 3 PM. There will be brief noise from the parking lot. Interior access is not required.

Thank you,
Property Management
preview: Hello, we will be performing scheduled exterior maintenance this Saturday from 9 AM to 3 PM.

subject: Re: Scheduled maintenance window — Saturday
body: Thanks for the heads-up — we will plan to be out that morning. Please let us know if anything changes.
preview: Thanks for the heads-up — we will plan to be out that morning.

subject: Fire alarm service — technician en route
body: A technician has been dispatched to address the fire alarm panel. ETA 30-45 minutes. Reply STOP to opt out of service updates.
preview: A technician has been dispatched to address the fire alarm panel. ETA 30-45 minutes.

subject: Confirmation: technician arrived
body: Technician arrived at 8:45 PM and confirmed the alarm panel is now operational. Thank you.
preview: Technician arrived at 8:45 PM and confirmed the alarm panel is now operational.

subject: Monthly rent reminder
body: This is a friendly reminder that your monthly rent payment is due on the 1st. You can pay online through the resident portal or set up autopay to avoid future reminders.
preview: This is a friendly reminder that your monthly rent payment is due on the 1st.

subject: Nightly portal sync complete
body: Nightly sync between the resident portal and property management database completed successfully at 02:15. 42 tenant records touched; 0 errors. Backup snapshot captured.
preview: Nightly sync between the resident portal and property management database completed successfully.
